208 How to Judge a Horoscope
of the astrologer for their correct interpretation and
explanation.
If the fifth house has beneficial associations or aspects,
there will be children. Lord of the Lagna in the fifth and the
fifth lord strong, or exchange of houses between first and
fifth lords, favours birth of children. If Jupiter, as lord of
the fifth, is strong and aspected by lord of Lagna, one gets
many issues. Lord of the 2nd, possessed of strength, in the
fifth, aspected by Jupiter, indicates birth of children. Birth
of children is also indicated when the lord of the Navamsa
occupied by the owner of the fifth be conjoined with or
aspected by a benefic or when the lord of the fifth is in
benefic amsas or when the lord of the Navamsa occupied
by the lord of the fifth is in Lagna bhava.
Children will die early if the lord of the fifth occupies
3, 6 or 12 and is aspected by no benefic; when the lord of
